domain.name: travel
domain.description: Travel planning tasks such as itineraries and day-by-day activity plans.

task.name: toronto_7day_trip
task.title: 7-Day Toronto Trip Plan
task.description: A detailed 7-day travel plan for Toronto with daily themes, points of interest, restaurants, and transport notes.

schema.name: itinerary
schema.description: Travel itinerary with ordered days and daily items (POI, Restaurant, Transport).

root_fields.title: 7-Day Toronto Trip
root_fields.summary: A balanced week in Toronto covering downtown highlights, museums, neighbourhoods, islands, and a day trip to Niagara Falls. Each day includes main POIs, a recommended restaurant, and transport notes.

fields.notes: Arrive at YYZ, take UP Express to Union Station or taxi to hotel.

fields.name: CN Tower & Harbourfront
fields.description: Visit CN Tower viewpoint and stroll along the harbourfront promenade.

fields.name: Harbourfront Bistro (recommended)
fields.description: Casual waterfront dining to recover from travel.

fields.name: Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)
fields.description: Major natural history and world cultures museum.

fields.name: Bata Shoe Museum / University of Toronto stroll
fields.description: Smaller specialty museum and campus walk nearby.

fields.name: Museum District Cafe
fields.description: Lunch near ROM with quick service for museum visits.

fields.name: Distillery District
fields.description: Cobblestone streets, galleries, boutiques, and historic buildings.

fields.name: St. Lawrence Market
fields.description: Iconic market for local foods and crafts.

fields.name: St. Lawrence Eatery
fields.description: Casual market dining for local specialties.

fields.notes: Take ferry from Jack Layton Ferry Terminal; check schedule.

fields.name: Centre Island & Hanlan's Point
fields.description: Beaches, picnic areas, bike paths and skyline views.

fields.name: Island Cafe / Picnic
fields.description: Casual options on the island or self-catered picnic.

fields.name: Kensington Market
fields.description: Eclectic shops, street art, vintage stores and multicultural eats.

fields.name: Queen West (art and boutiques)
fields.description: Trendy shops, galleries and music venues along Queen Street West.

fields.name: Local Brunch Spot
fields.description: Hip cafe for brunch or late lunch in the neighbourhoods.

fields.name: Art Gallery of Ontario (AGO)
fields.description: Extensive Canadian and international art collections.

fields.name: Ontario Science Centre (optional afternoon)
fields.description: Interactive science exhibits ideal for families and curious adults.

fields.name: Gallery District Bistro
fields.description: Lunch near AGO with light menu.

fields.theme: Day Trip to Niagara Falls or Free Day

fields.notes: Choose a day trip to Niagara Falls (1.5 hr) or use the day for shopping/relaxing in Toronto.

fields.name: Niagara Falls (if chosen)
fields.description: Iconic waterfalls, boat tours, and scenic viewpoints.

fields.name: Farewell Dinner Restaurant (Downtown)
fields.description: Nice dinner downtown to close the trip, reserve in advance.

domain.name: travel
domain.description: Travel planning tasks such as itineraries and day-by-day activity plans.

task.name: toronto_7day_trip
task.title: 7-Day Toronto Trip Plan
task.description: A detailed 7-day travel plan for Toronto with daily themes, points of interest, restaurants, and transport notes.

task_schema.name: itinerary_cs2
task_schema.description: Travel itinerary with ordered days and daily items (POI, Restaurant, Transport).
task_schema.hierarchy:
Itinerary (root)
    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)
        |-- POI (leaf)
        |-- Restaurant (leaf)
        `-- Transport (leaf)
task_schema.syntax_rules:
- Paths start with /Itinerary
- Node types: Itinerary, Day, POI, Restaurant, Transport
- Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]
- Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets

domain_schema.name: travel_domain
domain_schema.description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
domain_schema.hierarchy:
Travel_Root (root)
  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)
      `-- TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)

memory_xml:

display.domain_schema:
name: travel_domain
description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
hierarchy: "Travel_Root (root)\n  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)\n      `--\
  \ TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)"
nodes:
  Travel_Root:
    type: root
    fields: []
    children:
    - Task
  Task:
    type: container
    index_attr: name
    fields:
    - title
    - description
    - status
    children:
    - TaskVersion
  TaskVersion:
    type: version
    index_attr: number
    fields:
    - patch_info
    - conversation_history
    - created_at
    children: []
display.task_schema:
name: itinerary_cs2
description: Travel itinerary with ordered days and daily items (POI, Restaurant,
  Transport).
hierarchy: "Itinerary (root)\n    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)\n       \
  \ |-- POI (leaf)\n        |-- Restaurant (leaf)\n        `-- Transport (leaf)"
nodes:
  Itinerary:
    type: root
    fields:
    - title
    - summary
    children:
    - Day
  Day:
    type: container
    fields:
    - theme
    children:
    - POI
    - Restaurant
    - Transport
    index_attr: index
  POI:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
  Restaurant:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
  Transport:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - mode
    - time_block
    - notes
    children: []
data_files:
  toronto_7day_trip: memory/travel/toronto_7day_trip.xml
default_data: toronto_7day_trip
examples_file: prompts/query_generator/domains/xpath_examples_itinerary_cs2.txt
syntax_rules: '- Paths start with /Itinerary

  - Node types: Itinerary, Day, POI, Restaurant, Transport

  - Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]

  - Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets'
display.memory_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<Root>
  <Itinerary_Version number="1">
    <patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info>
    <conversation_history>I want 7 days travel plan in Toronto.</conversation_history>
    <Itinerary>
      <title>7-Day Toronto Trip</title>
      <summary>A balanced week in Toronto covering downtown highlights, museums, neighbourhoods, islands, and a day trip to Niagara Falls. Each day includes main POIs, a recommended restaurant, and transport notes.</summary>
      <Day index="1">
        <theme>Arrival & Downtown Orientation</theme>
        <Transport>
          <mode>Taxi / UP Express</mode>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <notes>Arrive at YYZ, take UP Express to Union Station or taxi to hotel.</notes>
        </Transport>
        <POI>
          <name>CN Tower & Harbourfront</name>
          <time_block>4:00 PM - 7:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Visit CN Tower viewpoint and stroll along the harbourfront promenade.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>City views</highlight>
            <highlight>Harbourwalk</highlight>
            <highlight>Sunset over lake</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Harbourfront Bistro (recommended)</name>
          <time_block>7:30 PM</time_block>
          <description>Casual waterfront dining to recover from travel.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Lake views</highlight>
            <highlight>Seafood options</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
      <Day index="2">
        <theme>Museums & Cultural Core</theme>
        <POI>
          <name>Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)</name>
          <time_block>9:30 AM - 12:30 PM</time_block>
          <description>Major natural history and world cultures museum.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Galleries</highlight>
            <highlight>Special exhibits</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <POI>
          <name>Bata Shoe Museum / University of Toronto stroll</name>
          <time_block>1:00 PM - 3:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Smaller specialty museum and campus walk nearby.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Unique collections</highlight>
            <highlight>Historic architecture</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Museum District Cafe</name>
          <time_block>12:30 PM</time_block>
          <description>Lunch near ROM with quick service for museum visits.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Sandwiches</highlight>
            <highlight>Salads</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
      <Day index="3">
        <theme>Historic Distillery & Shopping</theme>
        <POI>
          <name>Distillery District</name>
          <time_block>10:00 AM - 1:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Cobblestone streets, galleries, boutiques, and historic buildings.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Shops</highlight>
            <highlight>Galleries</highlight>
            <highlight>Photo spots</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <POI>
          <name>St. Lawrence Market</name>
          <time_block>1:30 PM - 3:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Iconic market for local foods and crafts.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Peameal bacon sandwich</highlight>
            <highlight>Artisan stalls</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>St. Lawrence Eatery</name>
          <time_block>1:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Casual market dining for local specialties.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Local produce</highlight>
            <highlight>Quick bites</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
      <Day index="4">
        <theme>Toronto Islands & Relaxation</theme>
        <Transport>
          <mode>Ferry</mode>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <notes>Take ferry from Jack Layton Ferry Terminal; check schedule.</notes>
        </Transport>
        <POI>
          <name>Centre Island & Hanlan's Point</name>
          <time_block>10:00 AM - 4:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Beaches, picnic areas, bike paths and skyline views.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Picnic</highlight>
            <highlight>Beach time</highlight>
            <highlight>Bike rentals</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Island Cafe / Picnic</name>
          <time_block>Lunch</time_block>
          <description>Casual options on the island or self-catered picnic.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Outdoor seating</highlight>
            <highlight>Casual menu</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
      <Day index="5">
        <theme>Neighbourhoods: Kensington & Queen West</theme>
        <POI>
          <name>Kensington Market</name>
          <time_block>10:00 AM - 12:30 PM</time_block>
          <description>Eclectic shops, street art, vintage stores and multicultural eats.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Vintage shops</highlight>
            <highlight>Street art</highlight>
            <highlight>Eclectic cafes</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <POI>
          <name>Queen West (art and boutiques)</name>
          <time_block>1:30 PM - 4:30 PM</time_block>
          <description>Trendy shops, galleries and music venues along Queen Street West.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Independent boutiques</highlight>
            <highlight>Murals</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Local Brunch Spot</name>
          <time_block>9:30 AM or 1:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Hip cafe for brunch or late lunch in the neighbourhoods.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Brunch menu</highlight>
            <highlight>Coffee specialties</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
      <Day index="6">
        <theme>Art & Science: AGO & Science Centre</theme>
        <POI>
          <name>Art Gallery of Ontario (AGO)</name>
          <time_block>10:00 AM - 1:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Extensive Canadian and international art collections.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Group of Seven</highlight>
            <highlight>Contemporary exhibits</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <POI>
          <name>Ontario Science Centre (optional afternoon)</name>
          <time_block>2:30 PM - 5:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Interactive science exhibits ideal for families and curious adults.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Hands-on exhibits</highlight>
            <highlight>Planetarium shows</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Gallery District Bistro</name>
          <time_block>1:15 PM</time_block>
          <description>Lunch near AGO with light menu.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Light meals</highlight>
            <highlight>Nearby walkable area</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
      <Day index="7">
        <theme>Day Trip to Niagara Falls or Free Day</theme>
        <Transport>
          <mode>Car / Coach / Train</mode>
          <time_block>Morning to Evening</time_block>
          <notes>Choose a day trip to Niagara Falls (1.5 hr) or use the day for shopping/relaxing in Toronto.</notes>
        </Transport>
        <POI>
          <name>Niagara Falls (if chosen)</name>
          <time_block>10:00 AM - 4:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Iconic waterfalls, boat tours, and scenic viewpoints.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Boat tour (Maid of the Mist/Hornblower)</highlight>
            <highlight>Clifton Hill options</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Farewell Dinner Restaurant (Downtown)</name>
          <time_block>7:00 PM</time_block>
          <description>Nice dinner downtown to close the trip, reserve in advance.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Fine dining option</highlight>
            <highlight>Local specialties</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
    </Itinerary>
  </Itinerary_Version>
</Root>
